title: poa angustifolia subsp. anceps
intro: Poa angustifolia subsp. anceps, also known as narrowleaf bluegrass, is a subspecies of grass in the Poaceae family native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Poa angustifolia subsp. anceps is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in herbal remedies and supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
